info.name: KitaLearn LMS API - Complete 12 Domains
info.description:
Complete Production-Ready API Collection for KitaLearn Learning Management System

All 12 Domains: Lecturer, Assessments, Courses, Activities, Enrollment, Submissions, Grades, Announcements, Classes, Identity, SLT Tracking, Progression & Certificates

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer Token (set after login)
**Base URL**: {{base_url}}
**Test Users**:
- Admin: admin@lms.test / admin123456
- Lecturer: lecturer@lms.test / lecturer123456
- Student: student@lms.test / student123456
